identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a warm, cozy, family-centric digital home that feels like a scrapbook, not a spreadsheet.

headings.usage: All section headers, page titles, and major calls to action. The rounded terminals evoke friendliness.

body.usage: General text, lists, inputs. High legibility but with a humanist touch.

accents.usage: Personal notes, 'handwritten' annotations, empty states. Adds the human touch.

rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use Deep Navy (#3D405B) for text.
Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for backgrounds. Use Cream (#F4F1DE) or Warm White (#FEFAE0).
Gradients should be subtle and warm, like a sunset, not 'tech' neon.

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.
layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl. No sharp corners.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#E07A5F] text-white hover:translate-y-[-2px] transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg font-bold px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-[#F2CC8F] text-[#3D405B] hover:bg-[#E5BE7E] font-bold px-6 py-2

cards.style: bg-[#FEFAE0] rounded-3xl border border-[#F2CC8F]/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-white/50 border-2 border-[#81B29A]/30 focus:border-[#81B29A] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#3D405B] placeholder:text-[#3D405B]/40

navigation.style: Floating dock or sidebar with rounded tabs. Active state: bg-[#E07A5F] text-white rounded-xl.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle 'paper grain' noise overlay on the main background to make it feel tactile.
visual_enhancers.illustrations: Use flat, organic illustrations for empty states (families, food, plants).
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Buttons should have a 'squishy' feel (scale 0.95 on click).

image_urls.note: Image selector tool failed. Use these placeholders or reliable sources.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/nunito', '@fontsource/dm-sans', and '@fontsource/caveat' to package.json immediately.
2. TAILWIND CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'colors' object defined above. Extend the theme, don't overwrite.

3. SHADCN OVERRIDE: Go into /components/ui and update button.jsx, card.jsx, input.jsx to match the 'rounded-2xl' and 'border-2' aesthetic. Remove the default 'ring-offset' focus styles and replace with a softer border color change.
4. LAYOUT: For the Dashboard, use the 'Bento Grid' strategy. Create a 'GridContainer' component that handles the responsive logic.
5. AUTH PAGE: Make it look like a welcoming home entrance. No cold login forms. Use the 'hero_family' image as a side cover.
6. PANTRY: Use the 'kitchen_pantry' image as a header background with a gradient overlay.
7. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute (e.g., 'login-btn', 'pantry-item-0').
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients, no 'Inter' font everywhere.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
